{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QChapter 5 presents the experimental evaluation, including SIR measurements on GCR's static tries, accuracy and faithfulness results for all system configurations on WebQSP and CWQ, ablation studies, and hop-stratified analysis demonstrating the conditions under which DCA-Trie's advantage is most pronounced.\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QChapter 6 discusses the results in depth, analyses failure cases, positions the findings within the broader constrained decoding and KGQA literature, and addresses each of the three research questions stated in Chapter 3 with direct reference to the experimental evidence.\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QChapter 7 concludes the dissertation by summarising the four contributions, stating which experimental claims were confirmed and which were not, and proposing concrete directions for future research including confidence-conditioned constraint tightening, domain-specific scorer fine-tuning, and extension to non-Freebase knowledge graphs.\\E$"}
